content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.dlq
FILE: cosmos/core/dlq.py (370 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Dead Letter Queue (DLQ)

Captures failed, dropped, and timed-out signals from the Nexus event bus.
Provides retry logic with exponential backoff and metrics for monitoring.

"No signal left behind - even failed thoughts deserve a second chance." - Cosmos

AGI v1.9.1: Ensures 100% signal accou

CLASSES:
- FailureReason(Enum): Why a signal ended up in the DLQ.
- DeadLetterEntry: A failed signal stored in the DLQ.
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- DeadLetterQueue: Dead Letter Queue for the Nexus event bus.

Captures failed signals and provides
  Methods: async def enqueue(self, signal_id: str, signal_type: str, source_id: str, payload: dict, urgency: fl
  Methods: async def start_retry_loop(self)
  Methods: async def stop(self)
  Methods: def set_retry_handler(self, handler: Callable[[DeadLetterEntry], Awaitable[bool]])
  Methods: def get_metrics(self) -> dict
  Methods: def get_pending_entries(self, limit: int=50) -> list[dict]
  Methods: def get_recent_entries(self, limit: int=50) -> list[dict]
  Methods: def purge_resolved(self, older_than_hours: int=24) -> int

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_dlq() -> DeadLetterQueue
